reason: Lumyn is still in deterministic MVP bootstrap. Overall first-party coverage is enforced at >=75%, while the stricter >=85% stable command/core threshold becomes fully binding once the command surface contains product-bearing logic beyond the skeleton and T3 local source intake.
compensating_validation: command-result schema validation in cmd/lumyn tests
expires_when: T3 implementation adds lumyn init/check product-bearing command logic or the next task changes cmd/lumyn coverage-sensitive behavior
